Treaty Between United States and CubaThe treaty concluded between the United States and the Republic of Cuba on , referred to in text, was terminated , pursuant to notice given by the United States on . See Bevans, Treaties, and Other International Agreements of the United States of America, 1776 to 1949, vol. VI, page 1106.Dec. 11, 1902Aug. 21, 1963Aug. 21, 1962
